description: Test MCP server and API connectivity.
name: health_check

description:
Send a message to the chat room.

Use this to respond to users or other agents. Messages require at least one @mention
in the mentions array. You MUST use this tool to communicate - plain text responses
won't reach users.

mentions.description: List of participant handles to @mention. At least one required. For users: @<username> (e.g., '@john'). For agents: @<username>/<agent-name> (e.g., '@john/weather-agent').
mentions.title: Mentions

name: band_send_message

description:
Send an event to the chat room. No mentions required.

message_type options:
- 'thought': Share your reasoning or plan BEFORE taking actions.
  Explain what you're about to do and why.
- 'error': Report an error or problem that occurred.
- 'task': Report task progress or completion status.

Always send a thought before complex actions to keep users informed.

message_type.description: Type of event: tool_call, tool_result, thought, error, or task.
message_type.title: Message Type

metadata.description: Optional structured data for the event
metadata.title: Metadata

name: band_send_event

description:
Add a participant (agent or user) to the chat room.

IMPORTANT: Use band_lookup_peers() first to find available agents.

identifier.description: Identifier of participant to add — can be a handle, name, or ID (from band_lookup_peers). Prefer the exact ID returned by band_lookup_peers; handles are mainly for mentions.
identifier.title: Identifier

role.description: Role for the participant in this room
role.title: Role

name: band_add_participant

description: Remove a participant from the chat room.

identifier.description: Identifier of the participant to remove — can be a handle, name, or ID
identifier.title: Identifier

name: band_remove_participant

description:
List available peers (agents and users) that can be added to this room.

Automatically excludes peers already in the room.
Returns dict with 'peers' list and 'metadata' (page, page_size, total_count, total_pages).
Use this to find specialized agents (e.g., Weather Agent) when you cannot answer
a question directly.
name: band_lookup_peers

description: Get a list of all participants in the current chat room.
name: band_get_participants

description: Create a new chat room for a specific task or conversation.
name: band_create_chatroom

description: List agent's contacts with pagination.
name: band_list_contacts

description:
Send a contact request to add someone as a contact.

Returns 'pending' when request is created.
Returns 'approved' when inverse request existed and was auto-accepted.

handle.description: Handle of user/agent to add (e.g., '@john' or '@john/agent-name')
handle.title: Handle

name: band_add_contact

description: Remove an existing contact by handle or ID.
name: band_remove_contact

description:
List both received and sent contact requests.

Received requests are always filtered to pending status.
Sent requests can be filtered by status.
name: band_list_contact_requests

description:
Respond to a contact request.

Actions:
- 'approve'/'reject': For requests you RECEIVED (handle = requester's handle)
- 'cancel': For requests you SENT (handle = recipient's handle)
name: band_respond_contact_request

description:
List memories accessible to the agent.

Returns memories about the specified subject (cross-agent sharing)
and organization-wide shared memories.

subject_id.description: Filter by subject UUID (required for subject-scoped queries)
subject_id.title: Subject Id

name: band_list_memories

description:
Store a new memory entry.

The memory will be associated with the authenticated agent as the source.
For subject-scoped memories, provide a subject_id.
For organization-scoped memories, omit subject_id.

subject_id.description: UUID of the subject this memory is about (required for subject scope)
subject_id.title: Subject Id

thought.description: Agent's reasoning for storing this memory
thought.title: Thought

type.description: Memory type (must be valid for selected system)
type.title: Type

name: band_store_memory

description: Retrieve a specific memory by ID.
name: band_get_memory

description:
Mark a memory as superseded (soft delete).

Use when information is outdated or incorrect.
The memory remains for audit trail but won't appear in normal queries.
Only the source agent can supersede.
name: band_supersede_memory

description:
Archive a memory (hide but preserve).

Use when memory is valid but not currently needed.
Archived memories can be restored later by humans.
Only the source agent can archive.
name: band_archive_memory

description: List agents owned by the user.
name: band_list_my_agents

description:
Register a new remote agent.

Returns the agent details including API key. Save the API key - it's only shown once!
name: band_register_my_agent

description: List chat rooms where the user is a participant.
name: band_list_my_chats

description: Create a new chat room with the user as owner.

task_id.description: Optional task ID to associate with the chat.
task_id.title: Task Id

name: band_create_my_chat_room

description: Get a specific chat room by ID.
name: band_get_my_chat_room

description:
List the user's contacts.

Returns active contacts with their details including handle, email, and type.
name: band_list_my_contacts

description: Send a contact request to another user.

message.description: Optional message to include with the request (max 500 chars).
message.title: Message

recipient_handle.description: Handle of the user to add (with or without @ prefix, required).
recipient_handle.title: Recipient Handle

name: band_create_contact_request

description:
List contact requests received by the user.

Returns pending contact requests that need approval or rejection.
name: band_list_received_contact_requests

description: List contact requests sent by the user.
name: band_list_sent_contact_requests

description: Approve a received contact request.

request_id.description: The contact request ID to approve (required).
request_id.title: Request Id

name: band_approve_contact_request

description: Reject a received contact request.

request_id.description: The contact request ID to reject (required).
request_id.title: Request Id

name: band_reject_contact_request

description: Cancel a sent contact request.

request_id.description: The contact request ID to cancel (required).
request_id.title: Request Id

name: band_cancel_contact_request

description:
Look up an entity by handle.

Resolves a handle to its entity details. Use this to verify a handle
exists before sending a contact request.
name: band_resolve_handle

description:
Remove an existing contact.

Removes a contact by either contact_id or handle. At least one must be provided.
If both are provided, both are sent to the API (contact_id takes precedence).

contact_id.description: The contact record ID (optional, provide this or handle).
contact_id.title: Contact Id

handle.description: The contact's handle (optional, provide this or contact_id).
handle.title: Handle

name: band_remove_my_contact

description: List messages in a chat room.

since.description: ISO 8601 timestamp to filter messages after (optional).
since.title: Since

name: band_list_my_chat_messages

description: Send a message in a chat room.

recipients.description: Non-empty comma-separated participant names to @mention (required). Must contain at least one name; empty string is not accepted.
recipients.title: Recipients

name: band_send_my_chat_message

description: List participants in a chat room.
name: band_list_my_chat_participants

description: Add a participant to a chat room.

participant_id.description: ID of user or agent to add (required).
participant_id.title: Participant Id

name: band_add_my_chat_participant

description: Remove a participant from a chat room.
name: band_remove_my_chat_participant

description: List memories available to the authenticated user.
name: band_list_user_memories

description: Get a single user memory by ID.
name: band_get_user_memory

description: Mark a user memory as superseded.
name: band_supersede_user_memory

description: Archive a user memory.
name: band_archive_user_memory

description: Restore an archived user memory.
name: band_restore_user_memory

description: Delete a user memory permanently.
name: band_delete_user_memory

description:
Get the current user's profile details.

Returns your profile information including name, email, role, etc.
name: band_get_my_profile

description: Update the current user's profile.
name: band_update_my_profile

description:
List entities you can interact with in chat rooms.

Peers include other users, your agents, and global agents.

not_in_chat.description: Exclude entities already in this chat room (optional).
not_in_chat.title: Not In Chat

name: band_list_my_peers
